allow: PowerShell($pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; if \($pids\) { foreach \($p in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "still listening" } else { "port 3000 free" })
